summary: Crypto portfolio app where users authenticate with Internet Identity, manually enter holdings, and the app fetches live coin prices to show current values and portfolio performance (gains/losses).
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Minimal geometric coin/portfolio logo mark, flat vector style (portfolio-logo.dim_512x512.png)
- Subtle abstract background/hero graphic with warm-neutral palette, soft gradients, no text (portfolio-hero-bg.dim_1600x900.png)

existing_features.title: Implement user authentication using Internet Identity and require users to be signed in before they can view or modify any portfolio data.

Allow authenticated users to create, view, edit, and delete their crypto holdings, where holdings are user-entered (no exchange sync). Each holding must include at minimum: asset identifier (symbol and/or coin id), quantity, and an optional cost basis (total cost or average buy price) to enable gains/loss calculations.
Fetch live coin prices from an external public price API and use them to compute each holding’s current value and the total portfolio value.
Display portfolio performance for authenticated users including per-asset and total gains/losses (both absolute and percentage) using current values and user-entered cost basis.
Add at least one simple performance visualization (e.g., allocation by asset and/or gains vs. losses summary) suitable for the available data (manual holdings + live prices + cost basis).

Create and apply a cohesive visual theme for the app (colors, typography, spacing, component styling) and use it consistently across authentication, holdings, and performance screens. Do not use a blue/purple primary palette.
Add generated static image assets required by the UI (logo and a subtle background/hero graphic) and render them from the frontend as static files (do not serve images from the backend).

new_feature_requests.summary: Allow users to manually enter and manage crypto holdings (no exchange sync)
Fetch live coin prices from an external API to value holdings
Show portfolio performance (gains/losses) with current values, including charts
Require user authentication via Internet Identity
